name: Prayers to Nuffle
effect: Roll on the Prayers to Nuffle table for a random pre-game blessing.

name: Temp Agency Cheerleaders
effect: Hire one extra Cheerleader for this game.

name: Part-time Assistant Coaches
effect: Hire one extra Assistant Coach for this game.

name: Team Mascot
effect: Once per half, on a 4+, gain a one-use team re-roll.

name: Weather Mage
effect: Once per game, re-roll the weather with a modifier of up to +2 / -2.

name: Bribes
effect: Each bribe: on a 2+ a player is not sent off for a [[foul]] (and may keep playing). 50,000 gp and 0-6 for Bribery and Corruption teams.

name: Extra Team Training
effect: Gain one extra team re-roll for this game.

name: Wandering Apothecary
effect: Acts once per game as an extra Apothecary (teams that may use an Apothecary).

name: Mortuary Assistant
effect: Once per game, re-roll a failed [[regeneration]] roll.

name: Plague Doctor
effect: Re-roll a failed [[regeneration]] roll, or act once as an Apothecary.

name: Riotous Rookies
effect: Field 2D3+1 extra Journeymen for this game.

name: Biased Referee
effect: On a 5+ an opposing fouler is sent off; +1 to Argue the Call. 80,000 gp for Bribery and Corruption teams.

name: Halfling Master Chef
effect: Roll 3D6; for each 4+ you gain a team re-roll this game and the opponent loses one. 100,000 gp for Halfling teams.

name: Mercenary Players
effect: Hire any positional or lineman at +30,000 gp over their cost; they gain [[loner]] (4+).

name: Wizard
effect: Once per game, cast Fireball or Zap (lightning bolt).
